definition: An optional second fill on the same Progress track, alongside the primary completion fill — the native <video> buffered-vs-currentTime pattern (a lighter secondary fill under the played fill; the YouTube/Netflix scrubber). Scoped to GENERIC completion (buffered-vs-played, downloaded-vs-verified, estimated-vs-actual); it is never a trust or data-provenance signal — claimed-vs-verified provenance is a separate axis, an app binding, never a term baked into the Progress contract.
usage: The optional `secondaryTrack` dimension of the Progress Intent (added #2533 Fork 2). A presentation dimension the intent owns, not a re-typing of progress into a provenance intent.
